name: Nessus / Tenable Vulnerability Management
description: Cloud-based vulnerability scanning platform. Monitor scan status, track asset inventory, and review vulnerabilities by severity.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Tenable.io at https://cloud.tenable.com
2. Click your name in the upper-right corner
3. Go to My Account > API Keys
4. Click Generate to create a new key pair
5. Copy the Access Key and Secret Key and paste them below

credentialFields.label: Access Key
credentialFields.helpText: Your Tenable.io API access key. Found in Settings > My Account > API Keys.

credentialFields.label: Secret Key
credentialFields.helpText: Your Tenable.io API secret key. Generated alongside the access key.

checks.name: Tenable Scan Monitoring
checks.description: Verifies vulnerability scans are configured and reports their current status.

checks.name: Tenable Asset Inventory
checks.description: Verifies assets are tracked and scanned in Tenable Vulnerability Management.

checks.name: Tenable Vulnerability Status
checks.description: Lists vulnerabilities by severity and flags critical and high findings.
